---
title: "ir fixture pinned rmarkdown"
format: html
ir:
  packages:
    - glue
    - rmarkdown
---

```{r}
# The document declares rmarkdown directly, so the resolver leaves it alone.
# Attach rmarkdown and confirm it loads from ir's resolved run library: the
# normalised path.package location (renv symlink resolved) must equal the
# normalised run library entry. Read the version from that library's
# DESCRIPTION.
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library("rmarkdown", character.only = TRUE))
lib <- strsplit(Sys.getenv("R_LIBS"), .Platform$path.sep, fixed = TRUE)[[1]][[1]]
expected <- normalizePath(file.path(lib, "rmarkdown"), mustWork = TRUE)
in_cache <- normalizePath(path.package("rmarkdown"), mustWork = TRUE) == expected

cat("ir.fixture=qmd-pinned\n")
cat("pinned.rmarkdown_in_cache=", tolower(in_cache), "\n", sep = "")
cat("pinned.rmarkdown_version=", read.dcf(file.path(expected, "DESCRIPTION"), "Version")[1, 1], "\n", sep = "")
```
